scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n agent,web "npm run dev -w @video-compressor/agent" "npm run dev -w @video-compressor/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build -w @video-compressor/agent
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @video-compressor/shared && npm run build -w @video-compressor/web
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build:web && node scripts/verify-release.mjs --deploy && node scripts/verify-published-release.mjs && npx --yes wrangler@4.112.0 pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name local-video-compressor-test --branch main
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && node scripts/verify-release.mjs --package && zsh scripts/package-mac.sh
